title: I Remember You Leaving All the Time
original_title: Μια Ζωή Σε Θυμάμαι Να Φεύγεις
overview: In Athens, a radical female journalist and a former stage actor share their lives against the backdrop of the regime change, right after the fall of the military dictatorship and the first legislative elections in 1974.
